title: GOOD: lichen_iface invariant (never cleared) with explicit documentation
description: lichen_l2.c lines 79-88: The comment explicitly states the invariant (lichen_iface is set once, never cleared), explains why (races with lora_rx_callback), and warns maintainers not to clear it in lichen_l2_enable(false). This is a 'bus factor' comment - without it, a reasonable person would 'clean up' by clearing the pointer and introduce a crash.
